aliases: Uniunea Națională a Barourilor din România
description: A parallel, illegal bar association in Romania, established by Pompiliu Bota in 2002, lacking legal personality. It allowed unauthorized persons to practice law, violating Romanian criminal codes. The organization was never legally recognized and operated as a criminal group.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Italy, the lawyer's certificates as being registered in the Bota Bar were considered worthless scraps of paper, and the Italians who used them were not allowed to register in the Italian bars or were erased from the Italian bars due to lacking the title 'lawyer'.
country_links.context: The organization's lawyer certificates were considered worthless in Italy, and Italians using them were not allowed to register in Italian bars.
